name: labelu-video
description: 视频裁剪打标桌面应用
author: labelu

scripts.dist:mac: npm run check:whats-new && npm run prepare:bin:mac && ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:win: npm run check:whats-new && npm run prepare:bin:win && ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ npm run build && ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.release: echo "请分别在 Windows / macOS 上执行 release:win 与 release:mac（同 version），用户端只会下载本平台安装包"
scripts.release:win: npm run check:whats-new && npm run prepare:bin:win && ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ npm run build && ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --win --x64 --publish always
scripts.release:mac: npm run check:whats-new && npm run prepare:bin:mac && ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish always
